storyHeading: Born from a love of natural hair and patient hands.
story1: Mel Hair Braiding was founded in Upper Marlboro Maryland with one simple belief: every client deserves a stylist who listens first, braids second. What started as weekend sessions in a home studio grew into a full-service protective styling space built on trust, technique, and genuine care.
pullQuote: I learned to braid in my mother's Living Room. Every style I do carries that memory.
story2: Today, Mel and her team serve clients across Upper Marlboro with the same intention that started it all — clean parts, comfortable tension, and styles that protect your hair while keeping you looking polished.

values.title: Hair Health First
values.text: Every technique is chosen to protect your natural hair — low tension, proper prep, and honest aftercare advice always.

values.title: Intentional Craft
values.text: We don't rush. Clean parts, consistent tension, and smooth finishes take time — and we give every install that time.

values.title: Client Comfort
values.text: From your first message to your last strand, we want you feeling informed, comfortable, and confident in the chair.

team.name: Mel
team.bio: Specializing in knotless braids, boho twists, and loc care. 10+ years of experience and a deep love for natural hair health.

team.name: Jordan
team.bio: Expert in feed-in cornrows, stitch braids, and box braids. Known for razor-sharp parts and quick, comfortable installs.

team.name: Nia
team.bio: Passionate about loc journeys, starter sets, and protective twists. Gentle hands and a calming presence in the studio.
